purpose: Exact symbol and method location should stay cheap and deterministic.

question_template: which API handles <business action> and what service does it call
purpose: Controller to service/client flow should cite entry point and next hop.

question_template: what data source does <business process> use
purpose: DTO/carrier evidence must not be promoted into final source claims.
Properties, YAML, and feature flags should be retrievable without LLM guesswork.
Error handling answers should trace condition, exception, and caller path.
Cross-repo dependency answers should use repo graph evidence.
Conversation context should carry prior table/class/method evidence into short follow-ups.
